name: ant
description: A software tool for automating software build processes

options.description: Show help for ant
Suppress sourcing of /etc/ant.conf, $HOME/.ant/ant.conf, and $HOME/.antrc configuration files
Enable use of jikes by default, unless set explicitly in configuration files
Print ant exec line generated by this launch script
Print project help information and exit
Print the version information and exit
Print information that might be helpful to diagnose or report problems and exit
Be extra quiet
Print nothing but task outputs and build failures
Be extra verbose
Print debugging information
Produce logging information without adornments
Specifies a path to search for jars and classes
Use given file for log
The class which is to perform logging
Add an instance of class as a project listener
Do not allow interactive input
Use given buildfile
Execute all targets that do not depend on failed target(s)
Load all properties from file with -D properties taking precedence
The class which will handle input requests
Search for buildfile towards the root of the filesystem and use it
A niceness value for the main thread
Run ant without using the jar files from ${user.home}/.ant/lib
Run ant without using CLASSPATH
Java1.5+: use the OS proxy settings
Override Ant's normal entry point
